_description: Known tracking storage key definitions with descriptions, set-by information, purpose categories, risk levels, and privacy notes. Used by the storage information lookup service to identify well-known localStorage and sessionStorage keys without requiring an LLM call. Sources include vendor documentation and reverse-engineering of common analytics/advertising SDKs.

_ga.description: Google Analytics client ID stored in localStorage — mirrors the _ga cookie for cross-storage tracking.

_ga_.description: Google Analytics 4 measurement data stored in localStorage.

_gac_.description: Google Ads conversion cookie data mirrored to localStorage.

amplitude_id.description: Amplitude analytics device identifier — persists a unique device ID for behavioural analytics.

amp_.description: Amplitude analytics storage — session data, user properties, or event metadata.

AMP_TOKEN.description: AMP (Accelerated Mobile Pages) linker token — used for cross-domain identity linking.

AMP_MKTG_.description: AMP marketing attribution token — captures campaign source data.

ajs_anonymous_id.description: Segment anonymous visitor ID — assigns a unique identifier before login.

ajs_user_id.description: Segment known user ID — stores the identified user's ID after authentication.

ajs_group_id.description: Segment group (company/account) ID for B2B analytics.

ajs_user_traits.description: Segment cached user traits/properties (name, email, plan, etc.).

mp_.description: Mixpanel analytics storage — stores distinct ID, device ID, and super properties.

mixpanel.description: Mixpanel analytics tracker data — event queue, user identity, or configuration.

_fbp.description: Facebook Pixel browser ID stored in localStorage — identifies the browser for ad targeting.

_fbc.description: Facebook click ID stored in localStorage — captures the fbclid parameter from ad clicks.

fb_.description: Facebook SDK storage — authentication tokens, session state, or pixel data.

_hjSessionUser_.description: Hotjar session user identifier — links recordings and heatmaps to a returning visitor.

_hjSession_.description: Hotjar session state — tracks the current browsing session for heatmaps and recordings.

hjViewportId.description: Hotjar viewport identifier for heatmap rendering.

_hjLocalStorageTest.description: Hotjar feature detection — tests whether localStorage is available.

__hs.description: HubSpot tracking storage — visitor identity, session, or form data.

hubspotutk.description: HubSpot user tracking key — identifies a visitor across sessions for CRM correlation.

hs-messages-.description: HubSpot chat widget state — stores conversation history and widget preferences.

intercom-.description: Intercom messenger state — stores session data, user identity, or widget configuration.

intercom.intercom-state.description: Intercom full application state — visitor identity, conversation history, and session data.

_ttp.description: TikTok Pixel tracking parameter stored in localStorage.

tt_.description: TikTok SDK storage — pixel data, session state, or attribution parameters.

li_.description: LinkedIn Insight Tag storage — campaign attribution or visitor identity data.

ln_or.description: LinkedIn origin referrer — tracks the referral source for LinkedIn ad attribution.

twid.description: Twitter/X identity token stored in localStorage.

twtr_pixel_.description: Twitter/X conversion pixel storage — tracks ad conversion events.

_pin_.description: Pinterest Tag storage — conversion tracking and audience building data.

_pinterest_.description: Pinterest SDK or embed storage — session state or user preferences.

_scid.description: Snapchat Pixel client ID — identifies the browser for Snap ad attribution.

sc_.description: Snapchat SDK storage — pixel events, session data, or attribution tokens.

cto_.description: Criteo retargeting storage — product feeds, visitor segments, or bid data.

s_cc.description: Adobe Analytics cookie check flag mirrored to localStorage.

s_sq.description: Adobe Analytics ClickMap data — stores the last link clicked.

AMCV_.description: Adobe Experience Cloud visitor ID — uniquely identifies users across Adobe services.

AMCVS_.description: Adobe Experience Cloud session flag — indicates an active ECID session.

s_fid.description: Adobe Analytics fallback visitor ID — used when third-party cookies are blocked.

optimizelyEndUserId.description: Optimizely experiment visitor ID — identifies the user for A/B test bucketing.

optimizely_data.description: Optimizely experiment configuration and variation assignments.

fs_uid.description: FullStory session recording user ID — links session replays to a user identity.

_fs_.description: FullStory session recording storage — device ID, session data, or replay metadata.

_hp2_id.description: Heap Analytics user identity — stores a persistent visitor ID.

_hp2_ses_props.description: Heap Analytics session properties — captures session-level metadata.

_hp2_props.description: Heap Analytics user properties — stores user-level attributes.

_pk_id.description: Matomo (Piwik) visitor ID stored in localStorage — identifies returning visitors.

_pk_ses.description: Matomo session indicator stored in localStorage.

__qca.description: Quantcast audience measurement ID stored in localStorage.

quantcast.description: Quantcast audience segmentation or consent data.

CookieConsent.description: Cookiebot consent state — stores the visitor's cookie consent preferences.

CookieConsentBulkSetting.description: Cookiebot bulk consent preferences for multiple cookie categories.

eupubconsent.description: IAB Europe Transparency & Consent Framework (TCF) consent string.

addtl_consent.description: Google Additional Consent Mode string — lists ad-tech vendors consented to beyond TCF.

OptanonConsent.description: OneTrust cookie consent preferences — stores category-level opt-in/opt-out state.

fingerprint.description: Browser fingerprint hash — a unique identifier derived from device and browser characteristics.

fpjs_.description: FingerprintJS visitor ID or session data — persistent device fingerprint.

device_id.description: Persistent device identifier — used to recognise the same device across sessions.

visitor_id.description: Persistent visitor identifier — used to track the same visitor across sessions.

session_id.description: Session identifier — groups page views and events into a single browsing session.

user_id.description: User identifier — associates browsing activity with a known or anonymous user profile.

drift.description: Drift live chat widget state — stores conversation data, visitor identity, or widget preferences.

crisp-client.description: Crisp chat widget session data — visitor identity and chat history.

loglevel.description: JavaScript logging level configuration — controls client-side debug output. Not a tracker.

debug.description: JavaScript debug mode flag (e.g., for the debug npm package). Not a tracker.

__storejs_.description: store.js feature detection — tests which storage backends are available. Not a tracker.

i18n.description: Internationalisation preference — stores the user's selected language or locale.

theme.description: UI theme preference — stores dark/light mode or colour scheme selection.

chartbeat.description: Chartbeat real-time analytics — engagement metrics and scroll depth tracking.

parsely.description: Parse.ly content analytics — tracks page views, engaged time, and referral sources.

permutive.description: Permutive audience segmentation — stores cohort assignments built on-device.

lotame.description: Lotame data management platform — audience segments and cross-domain identity data.

taboola.description: Taboola content recommendation storage — session ID, click data, or A/B test state.

outbrain.description: Outbrain content recommendation storage — click tracking and campaign attribution.

pbjs.description: Prebid.js header bidding — cached bid responses, timeout settings, or ad-unit configuration.

privacy_notes.analytics: Collects usage data that can profile browsing behaviour over time.
privacy_notes.advertising: Enables cross-site tracking and ad targeting based on your browsing history.
privacy_notes.fingerprinting: Creates a persistent device fingerprint that is difficult to opt out of.
privacy_notes.social-media: Allows social platforms to track your activity on third-party sites.
privacy_notes.identity-resolution: Links your identity across multiple sites and devices.
privacy_notes.session: Tracks your current browsing session — typically short-lived and low risk.
privacy_notes.consent: Stores your privacy preferences — not used for tracking.
privacy_notes.functional: Stores UI preferences or feature state — not used for tracking.
